# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and the phase or mission-runtime capability it supports.

## Checklist

- [ ] Preserves local-first behavior
- [ ] Preserves mission-runtime identity
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Safety defaults not weakened
- [ ] No post-MVP integrations snuck in
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated

## Verification

List the commands run, for example:

```bash
pnpm build
pnpm test
pnpm lint
```
